Race day archive

Race reports

Every round, logged after the gate drops — results, conditions, and the story behind each finish.
45

I'm Charlotte — a Kiwi now based in the UK. By day, I'm a Design Engineer at Triumph Motorcycles, working on mechatronic suspension systems. By the weekend, I'm either deep into one of my own projects, riding my bike, or off on some kind of adventure.

Racing hasn't been a straight line for me. In 2019, I stepped away from riding to focus fully on building my engineering career — at the time, I didn't know if I'd ever come back to racing. But the passion never really left, and coming back has been all about rebuilding confidence, fitness, racecraft, and the belief in myself.

2026 isn't just about results. It's about progression, consistency, becoming stronger mentally and physically, and seeing how far I can really go — racing under #45 on a Triumph, backed by a kit list built to hold up to a full season.

Backing the number 45
